creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

I have just tried the new LUA loader BE menu from 12.0-ALPHA6 and - I do not want to be rude, sorry - but it sucks :/

The BE switching now is a lot worse then what we had with 'old loader'.

Corresponding images and another comment on that case can be found here:
https://twitter.com/f0andrey/status/1043261772013215745

Is there a chance to implement a list of BE's like it was on the 'old loader' before 12.0-RELEASE?

Regards,
vermaden
